configure_addon.title: Configure the UsenetStreamer add-on
configure_addon.description: Set the admin shared secret that protects the UsenetStreamer admin API. Keep it safe — you can reuse it to open the add-on's admin dashboard.

progress.install_addon: Installing the UsenetStreamer add-on. This may take a few minutes.

abort.not_hassio: The UsenetStreamer integration requires Home Assistant OS or a Supervised installation so it can install and manage the add-on.
abort.addon_info_failed: Failed to get information about the UsenetStreamer add-on.
abort.addon_install_failed: Failed to install the UsenetStreamer add-on.
abort.addon_start_failed: Failed to start the UsenetStreamer add-on.
